name: phase06_layout_persistence
outcome_goal: Save customized layouts back to Postgres

jobs.label: p6_save_apis
p6_save_ui
jobs.prompt:
You are working in Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create two components:

1. src/grid/SaveLayoutBar.tsx
- Renders below the QuadrantGrid title: 'Save' and 'Save As' buttons
- 'Save': merges manifest with World ui.layout overrides, POSTs to /api/manifests/save
- 'Save As': prompts for name via a small inline input, POSTs to /api/manifests/save-as, navigates to new manifest
- Shows success/error Toast after save
- Only visible when there are unsaved changes (World ui.layout.quadrants has data)

2. src/primitives/Toast.tsx
- Simple notification component: message + type (success/error/info)
- Auto-dismisses after 3 seconds
- Position: fixed bottom-right
- Export a useToast() hook that returns { show(message, type) }

Integrate SaveLayoutBar into QuadrantGrid.tsx — render it between the title and the grid.

Write all files.
